argv: Slow cinematic build, solo cello with sparse felt-piano, warm domestic A24 register, 60 bpm, no drums, no melody hook, breath of strings rising over twelve seconds toward a single sustained chord, intimate close-mic'd, premium boutique advertising music

Wide static cinematic portrait shot: a vintage tilt-head stand mixer in iconic Empire Red glossy enamel sits at the center of a polished honed-marble counter inside a modern farmhouse kitchen at dawn, the kitchen is intentional and lived in with a wooden cutting board, a sourdough crock, dried herbs hanging in the background, a single brass tap reflecting the morning sky, the mixer is the focal subject in perfect quiet stillness, slow imperceptible push-in, 50mm full-frame, shallow depth of field, warm morning window light from camera-left at 3200K, deep cream-and-walnut palette with iconic Empire Red accent, gentle film grain, A24 domestic-warm color grade, locked 9:16 portrait

Slow steady cinematic pull-back portrait: a vintage tilt-head stand mixer in iconic Empire Red glossy enamel rests at the center of a marble counter in golden hour light, the mixer is surrounded by warm domestic clutter — a glass bowl of risen pale dough proofing under a creased linen towel, a wooden spoon at rest, a small ceramic vase of dried lavender, a worn cookbook lying open, the camera retreats unhurried and reveals the full warm counter, dust motes drift in the warm side light, no people in frame, 50mm full-frame, shallow depth of field, warm golden-hour window light from camera-left at 3000K, deep cream-and-walnut palette with iconic Empire Red accent, gentle film grain, A24 domestic-warm color grade, locked 9:16 portrait

Macro extreme close-up portrait: a stainless steel spiral dough hook turns slowly through pale sticky bread dough inside a polished stainless mixing bowl, the dough folds over itself in deliberate slow-motion sweeps, mid-shot a baker's flour-dusted hand enters from frame-right and cracks a single brown egg one-handed against the rim, the yolk drops into the rotating dough, the hand withdraws, the planetary action continues unbroken, 50mm full-frame, shallow depth of field, warm morning window light from camera-left at 3200K, deep cream-and-walnut palette with iconic Empire Red accent, gentle film grain, A24 domestic-warm color grade, locked 9:16 portrait
